title: WooCommerce credentials not linked in subworkflow
symptom: The HTTP node 'get_product' in the subworkflow shows an empty credentials field, causing the output to be empty during execution in production.
applies_when: Using WooCommerce node in a subworkflow
not_this_if: Node works fine in manual execution mode
root_cause: When a workflow runs as a subworkflow, n8n may lose the link to the credentials even if they appear to be set correctly. This can lead to errors during execution in production environments.
fix_steps: Open the subworkflow containing the HTTP node
Manually re-select the WooCommerce credentials from the dropdown
Repeat for any other nodes with similar issues
Activate the workflow and test it again from the parent workflow
agent_instruction: Re-link the WooCommerce credentials in the subworkflow's HTTP node and save the changes.
